text: Integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) can support efficient spectrum utilization and low-cost hardware, which provides a promising technology for future 5G-A and 6G mobile communication systems, and is more likely to be used in intelligent applications that require not only communication functions but also accurate sensing functions. In addition, the integrated sensing and communication signal (ISAC signal) is the basic signal for realizing the ISAC technology, and it has a direct relationship with the performance of the communication and sensing functions in the ISAC system. Therefore, it is extremely important to study the ISAC signal for the implementation of ISAC technology in the future mobile communication system. This article is the first to make a detailed literature review of the research works on ISAC signals in the context of mobile communication systems. The content is divided into three aspects, namely ISAC signal design, ISAC signal processing and ISAC signal optimization. Based on the mobile communication systems such as 5G, 5G-A and 6G, the related research works on ISAC signal design are reviewed. For the signal processing methods of the ISAC signal, the radar signal processing methods such as channel information matrix method, spectrum lines estimator method and super resolution method are reviewed. And based on the performance requirements of the communication and sensing functions, the PAPR optimization, interference management and adaptive signal optimization methods for the ISAC signal are reviewed, which provides a reference for the implementation of ISAC technology in 5G-A and 6G mobile communication systems.
explanation: The passage uses broad, generic statements with tautologies and lacks concrete specifics or references, a pattern often seen in AI-generated text.
